reviews.review_msg: His exams had a large amount of grammatical errors that made it extremely difficult to answer questions, MCQ were multiple paragraphs in a 50 minute exam? I understand that English may not be your first language but then someone needs to check grammar. He also gave the TA a version of the test that was grammatically correct and different from ours

Clearly all reviews on March 26 were made by him. For midterm 1 & 2, his MC questions were very disorganized. On MT2, his 2nd written question had almost everyone stumped and very confused. Also, since MC from MT2 was mostly by him, the TA reported that its where most people lost marks. He does not know how to test and teach.
Professor Balbinot is enthusiastic about the science and does a great job communications complex topics. This professor is not for beginners, you have to study hard!
Professor Gustavo is one of the best professor I ever had. He really work hard to deliver a comprehensive, high level talk. Highly recommended.
Recommended if you are the kind of student interested in science and work hard. If you do not apply yourself and study hard, you will fail this course.

I do not suggest taking BPK 306 with this guy. There are default slides that the BPK profs use for this course along with 205 and 305 but he adds on his own information onto the slides or adds new slides that expand on the material. This rarely makes it easier because it just forces you to have to study more concepts in an already heavy course.

He certainly knows his material, however, this is his first time teaching one of the most important courses for BPK. I feel that this was too quick of a jump because in our most recent lecture he found himself going to slow for the amount of material he must deliver within 50 minutes. It was kinda rushed and harder to understand with his accent...

Nice professor. However, he goes by his lecture slides so fast and expects you to read and understand the course material yourself before you come to lecture. Basically teaching your self very difficult topics that he doesn't explain in class slowly. His accent is super hard to understand so I can never hear a full sentence correctly.
His accent is extremely difficult to understand. His tests are extremely long and unrealistic to complete within the time slot provided.
Dr. Balbinot did an amazing job at simplifying difficult concepts, and his exams were very fair. He also genuinely cared about his students and wanted them to do well.
